ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Ilona Brusil, Esq. appearing for plaintiff. The Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Sections 583.210, 583.250 and pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). All previously imposed sanctions against the plaintiff are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)
